outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: uses the target language to exchange information and ideas

outcomes.name: Responding
outcomes.description: identifies and responds to information in texts

outcomes.name: Composing
outcomes.description: composes texts in the target language using a series of sentences

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: makes connections between cultural practices and language use

outcomes.name: Language awareness and building
outcomes.description: identifies challenges to maintaining, reviving and strengthening Aboriginal Languages

outcomes.name: Interacting in Auslan
outcomes.description: exchanges information and opinions using familiar language and protocols for known audiences

outcomes.name: Understanding texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: identifies information, opinions and ideas in texts and responds in Auslan and/or English

outcomes.name: Creating texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: creates informative and imaginative texts for different audiences using a range of familiar language

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: describes connections between language, culture and identity

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: identifies and responds to information to demonstrate understanding of texts with basic grammar and sentence structure

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: translates simple texts into English

outcomes.name: Intercultural understanding
outcomes.description: identifies connections between contemporary and target languages, culture(s) and identity

outcomes.name: Dance
outcomes.description: composes and performs dance to communicate ideas and intent using the elements of dance, and explains how ideas are conveyed to audiences and ways contexts influence dance

outcomes.name: Drama
outcomes.description: makes and performs drama to shape meaning using the dramatic elements, and explains how meaning is conveyed to audiences and ways contexts influence drama

outcomes.name: Music
outcomes.description: performs, uses listening skills and composes to communicate musical ideas using the elements of music, and explains how musical ideas are conveyed and ways contexts influence music

outcomes.name: Visual Arts
outcomes.description: makes artworks in intentional ways to represent ideas about their world, and explains ways artists are influenced by contexts and how artworks are interpreted by audiences

outcomes.name: Creating written texts in Creative Arts
outcomes.description: creates written texts to communicate ideas and understanding in Dance, Drama, Music and Visual Arts

outcomes.name: Oral language and communication
outcomes.description: communicates to wide audiences with social and cultural awareness, by interacting and presenting, and by analysing and evaluating for understanding

outcomes.name: Vocabulary
outcomes.description: extends Tier 2 and Tier 3 vocabulary through interacting, wide reading and writing, morphological analysis and generating precise definitions for specific contexts

outcomes.name: Reading comprehension
outcomes.description: fluently reads and comprehends texts for wide purposes, analysing text structures and language, and by monitoring comprehension

outcomes.name: Creating written texts
outcomes.description: plans, creates and revises written texts for multiple purposes and audiences through selection of text features, sentence-level grammar, punctuation and word-level language

outcomes.name: Spelling
outcomes.description: automatically applies taught phonological, orthographic and morphological generalisations and strategies when spelling in a range of contexts, and justifies spelling strategies used to spell unfamiliar words

outcomes.name: Handwriting
outcomes.description: sustains a legible, fluent and automatic handwriting style

outcomes.name: Digital transcription
outcomes.description: selects digital technologies to suit audience and purpose to create texts

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to literature
outcomes.description: analyses representations of ideas in literature through narrative, character, imagery, symbol and connotation, and adapts these representations when creating texts

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to literature
outcomes.description: analyses representations of ideas in literature through genre and theme that reflect perspective and context, argument and authority, and adapts these representations when creating texts

subjects.name: Human Society and its Environment
subjects.description: Learning area for Human Society and its Environment

outcomes.name: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander histories and cultures
outcomes.description: describes Aboriginal Knowledges and Practices that care for Country and the importance of Aboriginal Languages revival

outcomes.name: Geography
outcomes.description: examines global citizenship and how people organise, protect and sustainably use the environment, using geographical information

outcomes.name: History
outcomes.description: examines and describes the development of Australian colonies and Australia as a nation, using sources as evidence

outcomes.name: Democracy and civics
outcomes.description: describes the origins and features of Australia's democratic system of government and laws

outcomes.name: Creating written texts
outcomes.description: creates written texts to communicate ideas and understanding about people, places and events of the past and the present

outcomes.name: Working mathematically
outcomes.description: develops understanding and fluency in mathematics through exploring and connecting mathematical concepts, choosing and applying mathematical techniques to solve problems, and communicating their thinking and reasoning coherently and clearly

outcomes.name: Representing numbers
outcomes.description: applies an understanding of place value and the role of zero to represent the properties of numbers

outcomes.name: Representing numbers
outcomes.description: compares and orders decimals up to 3 decimal places

outcomes.name: Representing numbers
outcomes.description: determines percentages of quantities, and finds equivalent fractions and decimals for benchmark percentage values

outcomes.name: Additive relations
outcomes.description: selects and applies appropriate strategies to solve addition and subtraction problems

outcomes.name: Multiplicative relations
outcomes.description: selects and applies appropriate strategies to solve multiplication and division problems

outcomes.name: Multiplicative relations
outcomes.description: constructs and completes number sentences involving multiplicative relations, applying the order of operations to calculations

outcomes.name: Fractions
outcomes.description: compares and orders fractions with denominators of 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8 and 10

outcomes.name: Fractions
outcomes.description: determines simple fractions of measures and quantities

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: locates and describes points on a coordinate plane

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: selects and uses the appropriate unit and device to measure lengths and distances including perimeters

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: measures and constructs angles, and identifies the relationships between angles on a straight line and angles at a point

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: investigates and classifies two-dimensional shapes, including triangles and quadrilaterals based on their properties

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: selects and uses the appropriate unit to calculate areas, including areas of rectangles

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: combines, splits and rearranges shapes to determine the area of parallelograms and triangles

outcomes.name: Three-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: visualises, sketches and constructs three-dimensional objects, including prisms and pyramids, making connections to two-dimensional representations

outcomes.name: Three-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: selects and uses the appropriate unit to estimate, measure and calculate volumes and capacities

outcomes.name: Non-spatial measure
outcomes.description: selects and uses the appropriate unit and device to measure the masses of objects

outcomes.name: Non-spatial measure
outcomes.description: measures and compares duration, using 12- and 24-hour time and am and pm notation

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: constructs graphs using many-to-one scales

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: interprets data displays, including timelines and line graphs

outcomes.name: Chance
outcomes.description: conducts chance experiments and quantifies the probability

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: exchanges information and opinions in familiar contexts by using culturally appropriate rehearsed language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: identifies and responds to information and opinions in texts to demonstrate understanding

outcomes.name: Creating texts
outcomes.description: creates a range of texts for familiar communicative purposes by using culturally appropriate rehearsed language

subjects.name: Personal Development, Health and Physical Education
subjects.description: Learning area for Personal Development, Health and Physical Education

outcomes.name: Movement skill and physical activity
outcomes.description: refines and applies movement skills, strategies and collaboration in physical activities

outcomes.name: Respectful relationships and safety
outcomes.description: explains and applies skills and strategies to manage respectful relationships

outcomes.name: Respectful relationships and safety
outcomes.description: explains and applies skills and strategies to interact safely in offline and online contexts

outcomes.name: Identity, health and wellbeing
outcomes.description: examines and explains factors that influence identity, health and wellbeing of individuals and groups

outcomes.name: Self-management and interpersonal skills
outcomes.description: evaluates and applies self-management and interpersonal skills in a range of contexts

outcomes.name: Creating written texts in PDHPE
outcomes.description: creates written texts to communicate understanding of health, safety and wellbeing

subjects.name: Science and Technology
subjects.description: Learning area for Science and Technology

outcomes.name: Science
outcomes.description: uses evidence to explain how scientific knowledge can be used to develop sustainable practices

outcomes.name: Planning and conducting investigations
outcomes.description: poses questions to identify variables and conducts fair tests to gather data

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: interprets data to support explanations and arguments

outcomes.name: Design and digital technologies
outcomes.description: uses design processes to create, evaluate and modify designed solutions

outcomes.name: Design and digital technologies
outcomes.description: creates, evaluates and modifies algorithms to code or control digital devices and systems

outcomes.name: Creating written texts in Science and Technology
outcomes.description: creates written texts to communicate understanding of scientific and technological concepts and processes
